chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-733 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.3904/2020. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on MA No.3303/2020. 4. For order on MA No.3304/2020. 5. For hearing of main case. 13-08-2020 Mr. Bashir Ahmed Sethar advocate for petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General Sindh. At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioners submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this petition if appropriate directions are given to the Municipal Commissioner, Hyderabad to depute number of sweepers to lift the garbage situated at Survey No.87 and 88, Deh Malh Tappa Khattar, Taluka Latifabad, Hyderabad. Learned A.A.G. Sindh present in Court in other cases waives notice and recorded his no objection. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of along with listed applications with direction to the Municipal Commissioner, Hyderabad to depute some of sweepers to lift the garbage situated at Survey No.87 and 88, Deh Malh Tappa Khattar, Taluka Latifabad, Hyderabad within a period of one week’s time under intimation to this Court through Additional Registrar of this Court. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
